report.summary: Community growth cycle v12: identified MegaETH + Abstract Chain (just published, 290 pages) and Babylon Protocol Bitcoin Staking (queued) as net-new content since v11; drafted Sunday drop tweet for MegaETH/Abstract Chain, 290-page milestone tweet, MegaETH 6-post thread, Abstract Chain tweet, Babylon Protocol hold-draft, 290-pages milestone tweet; Discord/Telegram drop announcement; newsletter addendum with MegaETH + Abstract sections; 3 SVG social cards created (social-megaeth-guide.svg, social-abstract-chain-guide.svg, social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg); v11 posting schedule preserved with Sunday content added.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Sunday PM — immediate): Drop tweet for MegaETH + Abstract Chain: 'Two new guides just dropped on degen0x 🔥' — MegaETH 100K TPS hook + Abstract Chain ZK consumer rollup hook; two CTAs to respective guide pages
Tweet (Sunday PM): 290-pages milestone — 'Bloomberg Terminal of crypto for everyone' positioning; brand credibility play, no CTA link needed

Twitter thread (6 posts, Tuesday slot — can swap with EIP-7702): MegaETH deep dive — hook on '100K TPS mainnet in February'; EVM speed problem framing; mega-node architecture + EIP-2935; centralization tradeoff / Arbitrum parallel; who's building on it; CTA to /learn/megaeth-guide

Tweet (Wednesday, add alongside GENIUS Act + Tax): Abstract Chain — 'not just another L2' framing; ZK rollup + AA by default + Pudgy Penguins ecosystem; consumer crypto angle; CTA to /learn/abstract-chain-guide

Hold-draft tweet (on publish day for Babylon): 'Bitcoin is earning yield now. Not wrapped BTC. Not a synthetic.' — $1.9B TVL, 57K BTC, slash-proof timelocks, no bridging; CTA to /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking
Discord/Telegram (Sunday PM): Drop announcement for MegaETH + Abstract Chain with both guide URLs; community Q&A invite
Discord/Telegram (Monday): Sprint 58 Bloomberg Screener live data update — complements v11 schedule
Discord/Telegram (hold for Babylon publish): Babylon Protocol teaser — 'BTC staking is going live, guide shipping imminently'

Newsletter section addendum (Thursday Mar 19 send): Two new entries for 'NEW ON DEGEN0X' — MegaETH guide (100K TPS, EVM, architecture breakdown) + Abstract Chain guide (consumer ZK, AA by default, Pudgy ecosystem); 3 subject line variants with new MegaETH/L2 angle

Posting schedule: Sunday PM drop tweet + milestone tweet + Discord announce → Monday Bloomberg Screener tweet (v11) + Sprint 58 Discord → Tuesday MegaETH thread OR EIP-7702 thread → Wednesday Abstract Chain + Tax + GENIUS Act tweets → Thursday newsletter → Friday community poll → Babylon tease on publish day (TBD)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-megaeth-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: horizontal TPS comparison bar chart (MegaETH 100K vs Monad 10K testnet vs Arbitrum/Base/Optimism 2K each); '50× faster than Arbitrum' callout panel in glass-morphism; red/amber speed gradient title; three stat pills (TPS 100K, Latency 1ms, Status LIVE); category pill 'L2 GUIDE'. Saved to /public/social-megaeth-guide.svg

social-abstract-chain-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: split BEFORE/AFTER wallet UX comparison panel; BEFORE: 6-step wallet setup flow with per-step red gas fees; AFTER: 2-step connect + use flow with '$0 gas for users ✓' badge; blue/purple brand gradient title; three feature pills (Built on zkSync, Pudgy Penguins ecosystem, Gasless AA). Saved to /public/social-abstract-chain-guide.svg

social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg — 1200×630 social card: Bitcoin orange/amber theme on warm dark background; staking mechanism flow diagram (Your BTC → Bitcoin Timelock Script → PoS Chain Security → Yield Paid loop); three stat panels ($1.9B TVL, 57K BTC staked, 0.5–1.2% APY range); four key property checkmarks (no wrapping, slash-proof, non-custodial, no bridge risk); large faded ₿ glyph as decorative background element. Saved to /public/social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 17 — GSC organic signals are imminent (14-21 day window); today or tomorrow is the expected first impression data from Google
Net-new pages since v11: /learn/megaeth-guide + /learn/abstract-chain-guide (both promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES via deploy G1aoYkoba); page count now 290

Babylon Protocol Bitcoin Staking guide is in PUBLISH_QUEUE (depth: 1) — BabylonYieldEstimator.tsx interactive component built with 3 APY scenarios; hold Babylon social content until publish-day deploy

MegaETH scored 91/100: real-time EVM is a first-in-class narrative; 100K TPS vs 2K TPS for Arbitrum/Base is a visceral comparison; query clusters include 'megaeth guide', 'megaeth tps', 'megaeth mainnet 2026', 'fastest ethereum l2', 'real-time evm chain'

Abstract Chain scored 86/100: Pudgy Penguins crossover audience is a unique amplification vector beyond typical DeFi Twitter; consumer crypto narrative is differentiated; query clusters include 'abstract chain guide', 'abstract chain zksync', 'abstract chain pudgy penguins', 'consumer crypto l2 2026'

Babylon Protocol scored 88/100: 'BTC earning native yield without wrapping' is the clearest single-sentence hook in the pipeline; strong search intent for 'babylon protocol btc staking', 'native bitcoin staking', 'btc yield 2026'; $1.9B TVL makes it legitimately significant

Tuesday slot decision: recommend keeping EIP-7702 (Pectra thread from v11) on Tuesday if Bloomberg Screener live data deploys Monday as planned; swap to MegaETH thread if live data deploy is delayed — avoids announcing a product before it ships
290-page milestone tweet is a standalone brand credibility play — no guide link, purpose is social proof and platform positioning; replaces the 270-pages tweet from v10
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-15-social-drafts-v12.md
Social cards saved: /public/social-megaeth-guide.svg, /public/social-abstract-chain-guide.svg, /public/social-babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking.svg

Open carry-over: Build error 1b4a15e (apostrophe in AICourseRecommendations.tsx) still unpatched — blocking Sprint 59 (176 dApps, courses hub); Babylon publish is currently UNBLOCKED but next build batch is gated on this fix
Vercel Pro trial: 7 days remaining — Jefe billing action required
Sprint 58 (Bloomberg Screener live data) still at 0% code progress; community pre-staged Monday announce tweet from v11 — Sprint 58 deploy MUST land before Monday's tweet goes out
